  2023→                align_time=align_time,
  2024→                top_speed=args.top_speed,
  2025→                warp_speed=args.warp_speed,
  2026→                dock_time=args.dock_time,
  2027→                gate_time=args.gate_time
  2028→            )
  2029→
  2030→            sde = SDELoader(args.sde)
  2031→            try:
  2032→                sde.load_all()
  2033→            except Exception as e:
  2034→                print("Error loading SDE: {}".format(e), file=sys.stderr)
  2035→                sys.exit(1)
  2036→
  2037→            planner = RoutePlanner(sde, params)
  2038→            try:
  2039→                total_time, route = planner.plan(args.start, args.end)
  2040→            except ValueError as e:
  2041→                print("Error: {}".format(e), file=sys.stderr)
  2042→                sys.exit(1)
  2043→
  2044→            output_plan(sde, args.start, args.end, total_time, route)
  2045→
  2046→
  2047→def output_plan(sde: SDELoader, start_name: str, end_name: str,
  2048→                total_time: float, route: List[str]):
  2049→    """Output the formatted travel plan (original mode)."""
  2050→    # Resolve locations
  2051→    start_sys, start_sta = sde.resolve_location(start_name)
  2052→    end_sys, end_sta = sde.resolve_location(end_name)
  2053→
  2054→    # START line
  2055→    if start_sta:
  2056→        print("START: {}".format(start_sta.name))
  2057→    else:
  2058→        print("START: {}".format(start_sys.name))
  2059→
  2060→    # UNDOCK if starting from station
  2061→    if start_sta:
  2062→        print("UNDOCK")
  2063→
  2064→    # GO line with route
  2065→    if len(route) > 1:
  2066→        route_parts = []
  2067→        for sys_name in route:
  2068→            system = sde.get_system_by_name(sys_name)
  2069→            if system:
  2070→                route_parts.append("{} ({:.1f})".format(system.name, system.security))
  2071→            else:
  2072→                route_parts.append(sys_name)
  2073→        print("GO: " + " -> ".join(route_parts))
  2074→    elif len(route) == 1 and not end_sta:
  2075→        # Single system route, end is system
  2076→        system = sde.get_system_by_name(route[0])
  2077→        if system:
  2078→            print("GO: {} ({:.1f})".format(system.name, system.security))
  2079→
  2080→    # DOCK if ending at station
  2081→    if end_sta:
  2082→        print("DOCK: {}".format(end_sta.name))
  2083→
  2084→    # DONE line
  2085→    print("DONE: {}".format(format_time(total_time)))
  2086→
  2087→
  2088→if __name__ == "__main__":
  2089→    main()
